message:
refactor: remove dependency map view; show imports per doc page

- Remove DependencyMapView component and deps nav item entirely
- Remove depsGraph state and _deps.json fetch from frontend
- Remove deps view type from View union
- Strip @/ and ~/ path alias prefixes in resolveManifestKey and
  resolveDepToFilePath so @/lib/types resolves to lib/types.ts
- Imports and Imported by sections remain on each individual doc page
fix: pause all pairs on subscription cancellation, keep 1 for free trial

feat: show paused state on pair cards and disable controls when paused

- Add PausedBadge component shown in card header when webhookActive=false
- Add amber banner on card explaining the pair is paused with link to billing
- Disable Change/Select repo buttons and ExistingAccountPicker when paused
- Disable Regenerate button when paused
- Replace reprocess input with paused message when paused
- Pass isPaused from integrations page using pair.webhookActive

Fix wording in README for documentation repository

Updated wording for consistency in documentation repository reference.
